title: helianthemum vulgare var. hirtum
intro: Helianthemum vulgare var. hirtum, also known as Rockrose or Sticky Rockrose, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Helianthemum vulgare var. hirtum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
